query:
SELECT 'students' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM students
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lessons', COUNT(*) FROM lessons
UNION ALL
SELECT 'instruments', COUNT(*) FROM instruments
UNION ALL
SELECT 'reminders', COUNT(*) FROM reminders
UNION ALL
SELECT 'reminder_templates', COUNT(*) FROM reminder_templates
UNION ALL
SELECT 'payment_dues', COUNT(*) FROM payment_dues
UNION ALL
SELECT 'monthly_stats', COUNT(*) FROM monthly_stats
UNION ALL
SELECT 'settings', COUNT(*) FROM settings;
